description: Context-sensitive: inside an existing agent build, adding a Slack action should stay agent-anchored.

priorConversation.text: We're building an agent together: a research agent that investigates incoming customer escalations, digs through our docs and past tickets, and drafts a response.
Noted — the agent investigates escalations using docs and past tickets, then drafts a response.

conversation.text: Also send a Slack when done.

processExpectations: The agent explains that sending a Slack notification when done is naturally added as a new tool available to the existing agent, not as a separately spawned workflow.
The agent treats the request as extending the current agent with a new tool rather than proposing a new standalone workflow.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before classifying the request.
